$comment: Canonical message catalog. Both runtimes' protocol modules implement exactly these messages. JSON encoding for MVP; this file is the seam a binary encoding swaps in behind. Field types: s=string n=number b=bool o=object a=array ?=optional.

control.$comment: Shard host <-> master WS at /control. First message must be register with the shared secret.

heartbeat.$comment: info/shard = admin-dashboard telemetry (RoomAdminInfo: entity counts, block edits, clock, tick timings, memory, expiry, live player list)

requestTransfer.$comment: persist live state, then mint a ticket to the target room. viaPortalId = source portal on portal use; master lands the player at the paired portal in the target (portal with target===source, or the source portal's exitPortalId). arrival = admin-teleport landing coordinates (clamped into the room, ground-snapped). Neither = target default spawn.

mapData.$comment: top-down room map for the admin dashboard (pushed on open + when the edit overlay changes). data = base64 raw-deflate RGB, row-major, x-fastest

globalChat.$comment: relayed to every shard, then every RoomHost

roomStatus.$comment: room availability; RoomHosts surface as portal sealed/open

kick.$comment: admin dashboard: evict one player from a room

adminMove.$comment: admin dashboard teleport: same room + x/z = local snap; different room = transfer (arrive at x/z if given, else spawn)

requestMap.$comment: admin dashboard: ask a room to (re)send mapData

move.$comment: pitch keeps player aim live during windup/cast — projectiles fire where the mouse points at release

attack.$comment: use the held item's ability aimed by camera

equipSlot.$comment: equip the inventory stack at invIndex into an equipment slot (occupied gear swaps into the vacated invIndex); invIndex absent = unequip to first free inventory slot. Armor must match its def slot, trinkets go offhand, weapons always refused.

enchant.$comment: weave enchant enchantId at strength tier onto the equippable at inventory slot; server re-validates (free enchant slot, tier <= item cap and weaver maxTier, no duplicate modifier) and recomputes price (enchanting constants)

unenchant.$comment: strip woven modifier modId off the equippable at inventory slot (frees a slot, lifts curses); only weavers with service.remove; server recomputes removeCost

respawn.$comment: R while dead. In the hub: local spawn snap + full heal. Elsewhere: hub-bound transfer (arrive alive at hub spawn)

returnToHub.$comment: H key: hub-bound transfer from anywhere; ignored when dead or already transferring; system chat if already in the hub

blockPlace.$comment: place the held block item into a world cell (building rooms only)

blockBreak.$comment: break a block (building rooms; player-placed blocks refund their item)

world.$comment: voxel world header sent right after welcome: dimensions in blocks + number of chunk payloads that follow

chunks.$comment: batched 16x16xheight block chunks; data = raw-deflate base64, x-fastest then z then y

portals.$comment: open=false when the destination is down or boss-sealed; reopenInSec = countdown to a timed reopen; band = the DESTINATION room's suggested level band (def levelBand), absent for safe targets

inv.$comment: full inventory sync on change; held = hotbar slot index; equipment indexed head/chest/legs/feet/offhand

effects.$comment: self status effects for the HUD bar: aggregated gear modifiers (persistent) + timed slow/dot/hot (durMs = remaining at send; client counts down locally). speedMult = capped mods-only movement multiplier, mirrored in client prediction like the debuff slow. Sent after welcome + on any change.

proj.$comment: projectile spawn; client dead-reckons from velocity

died.$comment: self death -> death screen; send respawn to return

dialog.$comment: enchant = enchanter NPC weaving menu; each offer carries the modifier strength ladder tiers[]; applied strength = min(maxTier, target item tier cap); remove = weaver can strip enchants; display prices computed client-side, server recomputes at enchant receipt
dialog.name: s

ItemStack.$comment: per-instance item data. Equippables (weapon/armor/trinket) carry stat rolls (multipliers around 1: dmg+spd for weapons, armor for armor), rolled durability (dur counts down; breaks at 0; trinkets never wear), and possibly dynamic modifiers (shared/modifiers.json ids; curses negative). Minted server-side (mintItem); stackables stay uniform so they merge.

EntityFull.name: s?
EntityFull.$comment2: loot = bag contents for kind=loot (rarest first, max 3; [] = gold only) so clients render the actual dropped items
EntityFull.$comment3: boss = resolved boss/miniboss flag on mobs (mobs.json `boss`, rank-overridable); clients keep boss nameplates visible at range. Absent = normal mob

EntityDelta.$comment: id plus only changed fields of EntityFull (x/y/z/yaw/anim/hp/act/actMs/loot)

CombatEvent.$comment: dmg:{src,tgt,amount,crit} heal:{tgt,amount} death:{id,by} stagger:{id} xp:{amount} levelup:{id,level}

BlockEdit.$comment: sparse voxel edit persisted in RoomState.blocks
